description: Declares contribution and funding entry points published by a steward DID. Canonical schema for at.fund

main.description: Canonical contribution entry points published by a steward DID. Optionally restricted to specific domains via restrictToDomains.

restrictToDomains.description: Optional allowlist of domain/hostnames for which these contribution links should be considered applicable (e.g. example.com, pds.example.com). When omitted or empty, the record is open.
